name: hermes-harness-skills
description: Enterprise-grade AI coding harness — 7 self-evolving skills for VS Code Copilot. ponytail-audit (detector-validator pipeline), nerd-code (7-stage code generation), conductor (parallel lens orchestration), security-sentinel (24 CWE symptom routes), critical-review, ponytail (restraint ladder), copilot-memory-harness (persistent cross-session memory). 77% token reduction since v1.0.0. 60/40 held-out split with overfitting guard. Backed by Google SRE data, OWASP Benchmark, and KDD 2026 research.
author: Mansoor Stuman
